0.1.1-alpha.description:
# Foragipelago v0.1.1
## Bug fixes
### Apworld and client changes
-Create_item() is fixed, UT should work properly now.
-Some progressive Tools are now correctly given.
### Mod changes 
- Level goal option is fully implemented.
- Manually sending an item doesn't flood the chat with an error message.
- The error message about a value not being a string should not randomly spawn anymore.
- Being in a dungeon or inside other structures should not stop most code from running anymore (Untested)
- Removed Old and useless debug functions

## Known issues
-The game randomly crash when exiting to main menu or dying. (Cause is partially known)
-The amount of any Useful or Filler items are janky.
-"Reach Level X" checks are forever missed if the client is disconnected when obtained. 

Backward compability should be a thing with 0.1.0
